trade.summary: Moderate trade with complementary commodity profiles. Brasile exports soybeans, cotton, and iron ore to Thailandia. Thailandia exports electronics, automotive parts, rubber, and processed foods to Brasile.

diplomatic.summary: Normal diplomatic relations without significant political tension. Both countries cooperate in agricultural trade. Thailandia is a fellow emerging market. Limited high-level engagement.

military.summary: No military cooperation. Very limited defense ties.

financial.summary: Very limited bilateral investment. Some Thai agribusiness companies have explored Brasileian market. Brasileian agribusiness firms export to Thailandia.

energy.summary: Very limited energy trade. Some biofuel trade. Both are producers of sugarcane ethanol.

scientific.summary: Very limited scientific cooperation. Some exchange in agricultural and food sciences. Growing interest in sustainable aquaculture research.
